pass_stable_variable.claim: Longitudinal MC pattern tracking is more reliable when repeated symbolic phrases preserve stable operational definitions across time.
pass_stable_variable.revision_reason: Adds a guard against silently comparing different constructs under the same symbolic label.

tracked_variable.name: visual_focus_effort
tracked_variable.measurement_method: daily self-rating prompt with fixed anchor text

pass_stable_variable.baseline_definition: Effort required to maintain comfortable visual focus during a fixed reading task, rated 0 to 4.
pass_stable_variable.current_definition: Effort required to maintain comfortable visual focus during a fixed reading task, rated 0 to 4.

timepoints.definition: Fixed reading task effort rating 0 to 4
Fixed reading task effort rating 0 to 4

pass_stable_variable.missingness: Both timepoints are observed and use the same definition, unit, and method.
pass_stable_variable.falsification_route: Fails if a changed definition, method, or unit is still scored as the same variable.
pass_stable_variable.next_executable_action: Run validator before longitudinal trend scoring.

fail_semantic_drift.claim: A reused symbolic phrase can be longitudinally compared even when its operational meaning changes.
fail_semantic_drift.revision_reason: Negative fixture proves that semantic drift must force review or variable split.
fail_semantic_drift.baseline_definition: Perceived effort to initiate movement after rest, rated 0 to 4.
fail_semantic_drift.current_definition: Emotional exhaustion after interpersonal stress, rated 0 to 4.
fail_semantic_drift.missingness: No missing values, but construct meaning changed across timepoints.
fail_semantic_drift.falsification_route: Validator must reject this packet or require a new variable identity.
fail_semantic_drift.next_executable_action: Split into separate variables before scoring.

fail_private_packet.claim: Private longitudinal packets can enter public-safe discovery memory if their variable labels are generic.
fail_private_packet.revision_reason: Negative fixture proves privacy status overrides otherwise valid structure.
fail_private_packet.baseline_definition: Private named event count extracted from personal diary entries.
fail_private_packet.current_definition: Private named event count extracted from personal diary entries.
fail_private_packet.missingness: Observed but privacy rejected for public memory.
fail_private_packet.falsification_route: Validator must reject any private_rejected packet.
fail_private_packet.next_executable_action: Deidentify or keep out of public-safe memory.
